title: Iran navy claims 32 vessels crossed Strait of Hormuz under IRGC clearance
snippet: Fleet of 32 vessels successfully crossed Hormuz after obtaining IRGC Navy permission. Mix of oil tankers, container ships, commercial vessels. Part of multi-layered transit system giving preference to allied nations (China, Russia, India, Iraq, Pakistan). Overall transit still at ~2% of pre-crisis volume.
tag_reason: New daily transit data: 32 vessels vs 25 on May 23 — gradual increase in managed Hormuz traffic
